davidson_parcels.name: Metro Nashville / Davidson County Parcels (Regrid-enriched)
davidson_parcels.description: Current-parcel snapshot: owner, mailing address, land use, homestead, APN/ParID crosswalk
davidson_parcels.note: CSV (point lat/lon, no polygons). Polygon geometry can be joined later from a Davidson cadastral GeoJSON on ParID.

davidson_parcels_geom.name: Davidson Ownership Parcels (ArcGIS polygons)
davidson_parcels_geom.description: Polygon geometry + owner + mailing (APN, ParID, Owner, OwnAddr1-3, OwnCity/State/Zip, IsActive, ParType). Source for the map/tiles; join use code from davidson_use_codes.

davidson_use_codes.name: Davidson land-use codes (from Metro ParcelViewer GetUseCodes)
davidson_use_codes.description: 94 use codes; 18 flagged residential (is_residential=Y). Drives the residential filter.

davidson_sos_lookup.name: TN Secretary of State business-entity lookup (TNBear scrape)
davidson_sos_lookup.description: Per-entity control#, registered agent, principal office address, mailing address, status
davidson_sos_lookup.note: TN has no bulk officer data; principal_office_address is the shell-linking bridge (TN Code 48-208-101 bars PO box for RA).
